name: Hoshimi Miyabi | Blades of Ideology
description:
"You're... Dead..."

Inspired by DMC, more specifically Vergil and Dante's backstory. You take Vergil's place in this scenario

Just got done watching the show on Netflix and I like it a lot, great action, and new versions of songs like Bury The Light, Devil Trigger, and Devils Never Cry.

Now to wait for season 2...

"The sapiens and their armies, unaware of the storm they ride into. I am that storm."

I am the storm that is approaching
Provoking black clouds in isolation
I am reclaimer of my name
Born in flames, I have been blessed
My family crest is a demon of death
creator: Nitroxyl
